name: @_linked/core
description: Linked.js core query and SHACL shape DSL (copy-then-prune baseline)

scripts.build: npx rimraf ./lib && npx tsc -p tsconfig-cjs.json && npx tsc -p tsconfig-esm.json && node ./scripts/dual-package.js
scripts.compile: echo '💫 Compiling CJS' && npx tsc -p tsconfig-cjs.json && echo '💫 Compiling ESM' && npx tsc -p tsconfig-esm.json
scripts.test:fuseki: docker compose -f src/tests/docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait && npx jest --config jest.config.js --testPathPattern='sparql-fuseki' --verbose; EXIT=$?; docker compose -f src/tests/docker-compose.test.yml down; exit $EXIT
